name: FilmCow Royalty Free Sound Effects
author: FilmCow (Jason Steele)
license: Royalty Free — use in any project, commercial or personal
description: The complete FilmCow royalty-free sound effects library by Jason Steele (Charlie the Unicorn, Llamas with Hats). 3,800+ hand-recorded sound effects covering foley, impacts, nature, voices, and more. Perfect for tabletop gaming, video production, and game development.
